projectDescription: Educational browser-based simulator for symmetric multiprocessing systems with MSI cache coherence and real-time performance metrics.
keyFeatures: Configurable 2-4 core SMP system with in-order pipelines
MSI cache coherence protocol with private L1I/L1D caches
Real-time visualization of parallel execution and metrics
Multiple workloads (vector, matrix multiplication, histogram, control flow)
gshare branch predictor with configurable history
Performance metrics: IPC, speedup, MPKI, branch accuracy
publicApiSurface: Processor class - Main SMP system orchestrator
Pipeline class - 5-stage in-order pipeline (IF, ID, EX, MEM, WB)
Cache class - Set-associative cache with MSI states
CoherenceBus class - MSI protocol coordinator with snoop/invalidate
CacheLine class - Individual cache line with tag and state
BranchPredictor class - gshare 2-bit saturating counter predictor
